question: What is your return policy?
answer: You can return most items purchased on Flipkart within 10 to 30 days of delivery depending on the category. The product must be unused and in its original packaging.

question: How do I cancel my order?
answer: You can cancel your order from the 'My Orders' section of your account before it is shipped. A full refund will be processed to your original payment method.

question: What is the delivery time?
answer: Delivery times vary depending on your location and the seller. Typically orders are delivered within 2 to 5 business days. You can track your package under 'My Orders'.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept Credit/Debit cards Net Banking UPI Cash on Delivery (COD) and Flipkart Pay Later.

question: How do I track my package?
answer: Go to 'My Orders' on the app or website click on the specific order and you will see the real-time tracking details and estimated delivery date.

question: Are there any shipping charges?
answer: Flipkart offers free shipping on orders above ₹499 for most products. Orders below ₹499 may incur a delivery charge of ₹40.
